task_completion.description: Configure scautopick bindings and filter for stations with waveform data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal commands or GUI showing configuration of 'scautopick' bindings for stations BKB, GSI, and SANI, and setting a bandpass filter (e.g., BW(3,0.3,3)).

task_completion.description: Run offline playback of the 2024-001 data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing the execution of a playback command (e.g., 'scautopick -I sdsarchive:///home/ga/seiscomp/var/lib/archive ...' or similar playback command).

task_completion.description: Write the validation script to query the database and compute distances.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor showing the Python script '/home/ga/validate_pipeline.py' with MySQL queries to the SeisComP database and distance calculation logic.
Terminal showing the execution of the script (e.g., 'python3 /home/ga/validate_pipeline.py').

task_completion.description: Verify the generated JSON report contains the required fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing the contents of '/home/ga/pipeline_report.json' with fields: pick_count, origin_count, origin_lat, origin_lon, origin_depth_km, origin_time, and station_picks.

integrity.description: The Python script must dynamically query the database and not contain hardcoded values for the expected origin or pick counts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check the script code in the text editor to ensure it uses SQL queries (e.g., SELECT ... FROM Origin) rather than hardcoded numbers like 37.4874 or 137.271.

integrity.description: The agent must actually run the offline playback command.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the actual execution of the playback command in the terminal, rather than manual database insertions.

integrity.description: The JSON report must be generated by the Python script.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the Python script contains code to write to '/home/ga/pipeline_report.json' (e.g., json.dump) and the agent doesn't manually create the file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Stations with waveform data: GE.BKB, GE.GSI, GE.SANI. Bindings path: /home/ga/seiscomp/etc/key/station_GE_{STA} containing 'scautopick'. Database connection: mysql://sysop:sysop@localhost/seiscomp. Validation script path: /home/ga/validate_pipeline.py. Report path: /home/ga/pipeline_report.json. Required JSON fields: pick_count, origin_count, origin_lat, origin_lon, origin_depth_km, origin_time, station_picks (with code, pick_time, distance_km). Expected origin: lat ~37.4874, lon ~137.271.
